name: Worlds Hardest Traffic Box
description: World's Hardest Traffic Box is an interesting adventure puzzle online game with the theme of moving boxes. The simple and fresh picture is very logical. Avoid all kinds of obstacles in the game to let the small box reach the finish line smoothly, which tests your control of timing and speed. There are so many levels that you can't stop playing. Come and join us if you like!
tags: Android, Avoid, Block, Boy, Brain, Fun, HTML5, Kid, Obstacle, Online, Puzzle
